scripts.vercel-build: cp -r web/* . && node -e "const fs=require('fs');let h=fs.readFileSync('miniapp.html','utf8');const c=fs.readFileSync('web/components.js','utf8');h=h.replace('<script>/* components.js is inlined below — edit web/components.js and rebuild */</script>','<script>'+c+'</script>');fs.writeFileSync('miniapp.html',h)"
